title: thelypteris evoluta
intro: Thelypteris evoluta, also known as the evolution fern, is a species of fern in the family Thelypteridaceae. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its potential medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Thelypteris evoluta are said to include relief from respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate menstrual cramps. In herbal preparations, Thelypteris evoluta is often dried and used in teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
